title: bidens schaffneri
intro: Bidens schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's bidens or Mexican beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bidens schaffneri include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Bidens schaffneri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
